descriptionHtml:
Bali 4.2 for sale 2026 | 3 cabins Owner's version | Tax Not Paid

NEW with Guarantee Bali

Cancelled order at an interesting price, the Bali 4.2 for sale 2025 offers a thoughtful mix of practical features, comfort, and solid construction. This model is NEW and features the desirable 3 cabin layout, each equipped with an en-suite head and shower, delivering a private and comfortable onboard experience for guests.

Main Specifications and Features:

(AUTOPILOT, GPS, CODE 0, INVERTER, WATERMAKER...)

Excellence Pack:

  • Freshwater purifying filter
  • Combined 70 amp battery charger/inverter 12V/230V – 1600VA
  • 2 extra service batteries of 130 amp
  • Battery controller
  • Fridge freezer 336L with chilled water and dedicated inverter 230V
  • Electrical winch (mainsail halyards, solent sheet, mainsheet, reefs and davits)
  • Automatic first and second reef
  • Stainless steel pulpits with seats and solid handrails
  • Electric windlass 1000W
  • Saloon manual tilting bay/door, assisted by pneumatic struts
  • Lateral sliding windows
  • Saloon courtesy lighting
  • Extra freshwater tank of 400L for total capacity of 860L
  • Extra fuel tank of 315L for total capacity of 630L
  • Gaz oven, pot holders on hob, high-level cupboards in galley
  • Bar integrated in saloon table with reversible tray
  • Forward cockpit cushions (seats and backrests)
  • Helmsman seat cushions (seat and backrest)
  • Seats for aft bench (seats and backrests)
  • Engine room & locker hatches on gas struts
  • Tender lifting system
  • Comfortable swim ladder with handles and wide teak steps
  • Hot and cold cockpit shower
  • Raymarine Electronic Pack 1: autopilot P70S, GPS plotter AXIOM 7", MULTI I70S, VHF RAY 63
  • 2 layers of antifouling with Epoxy base coat
  • Safety equipment for 8 (life-raft, lifejackets, buoy, compass, logbook, flashlight, bucket, first aid kit, fender socks, mooring ropes, fenders; without EPIRB and flares)
  • Transom stickers: name and port of registry (to be specified prior to delivery)

Elegance Pack:

  • Hulls: padded headboard, indirect lighting, polished reading lights, magazine pockets, comfort accessories in bathrooms
  • Saloon: chart table reading light, folding seat for chart table, saloon table with bar and wood surrounds, ambient lighting, upholstery bands with armrests, electric rear bay lift system with hydraulic cylinders, flagpole and bracket

Rigging – Sails:

  • Square top reinforced Dacron fully-battened mainsail, Solent with UV protection, Lazy-Bag and Lazy-Jack
  • Triradial Code 0 (63m²) with anti-twist cable
  • Code 0 rigging: manual winch on portside, bowsprit, furler, bobstays, blocks & deck fittings

Mechanics – Safety Equipment:

  • 2 Nanni 50 hp 4-cylinder engines
  • Kit of two additional 12V 120A alternators

Comfort:

  • Tilting forward windows with locking system
  • Low consumption 12V 90L/H watermaker
  • Large freshwater electric toilet model
  • 1 fan per cabin, saloon, and forepeak (2 max. in saloon)

Interior Setup:

  • Portside forepeak layout (shower and head)

Exterior Setup:

  • Sun awning for forward cockpit
  • Set of folding sun loungers for foredeck
  • Maxi lounger cushions on flybridge
  • Flybridge sunbathing cushions (with backrests)
  • Protective rubrail for sugarscoops and aft platform
  • Stern spring cleats
  • Plancha grill with gaz installation

Electronics – Hifi:

  • Fusion Hifi Radio 4 HP Bluetooth (Saloon & Foredeck)

The Bali 4.2 for sale 2025 invites you to step on board, settle into easy cruising and entertaining, and enjoy the practicality and comfort of a thoughtfully designed sailing catamaran. For further details or to arrange a viewing, please get in touch.
